channel.title: Issue 1 — June 2026 on The Community Voice
channel.description: Recent content in Issue 1 — June 2026 on The Community Voice

item.title: Welcome to the Neighbourhood
item.description:
We’re thrilled to bring you the first issue of The Community Voice — a magazine written by neighbours, for neighbours. Every issue we’ll share the stories, events, and people that make this place feel like home.

Got a story to tell? Get in touch — the details are in the footer of every page.

item.title: Local Market Returns
item.description:
The Saturday market is back, bringing fresh produce, local crafts, and live music to the town square every weekend this spring.

Organisers say more than thirty stallholders have already signed up, with room for a few more — reach out via the contact details below if you’d like a stall.
